name: site-doctor-audit
description: Parallel site + vendor audit, then triage into a fix order. The triager is the memory steward: the parallel auditors submit shared-memory proposals (including the stack.md connector update); only the triager writes tasks/decisions/handoff/stack.
rules: auditors write only their own artifact (bugs.md / risks.md) directly; everything destined for tasks/decisions/handoff/stack goes through proposals to the triager — both auditors READ the pre-existing stack.md, so no same-stage read-after-write exists
vendor audits run only for providers recorded in .solo/stack.md; skipped vendors are N/A with evidence

memory_steward.merge_policy: single writer for shared memory: parallel seats submit proposals (.solo/proposals/<seat>-<run_id>.md); the steward merges them, allocates unique T-IDs, merges decisions/handoffs, and reports conflicts

seats.deliverable: Evidence-based site findings in bugs.md; fix-list/decisions/handoff submitted as proposals

seats.agent_note: vendor auditing is the site-doctor agent pointed at the stack layer
seats.deliverable: Connector tiers recorded (as a stack.md proposal the triager merges); vendor audits (/stack:audit-*) per stack.md with N/A reasons for the rest; risks in risks.md

seats.agent_note: triage IS the steward's merge duty plus /gate:score-project scoring
seats.deliverable: Merged, deduplicated fix order with unique T-IDs; connector update merged into stack.md; project score recorded; conflicts flagged

exit_criteria: all findings triaged into tasks.md with unique T-IDs and a recorded 14-category score

assumes_preexisting..solo/stack.md: recorded by /stack:intake in an earlier session — the audit is stack-conditional and reads it first
assumes_preexisting..solo/monitoring.md: recorded by an earlier release/DevOps session; the site auditor reads what monitoring exists
assumes_preexisting..solo/env-contract.md: produced by the contracts phase of an earlier room/session; read by the stack auditor
